calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Supporting Declaration And Proposed Order
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Louis Nmezie
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ashar Ahmed, Esq. of Infinity Law Group for Plaintiff SAN FRANCISCO INDEPENDENT TAXI ASSOCIATION.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO INDEPENDENT TAXI ASSOCIATION's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Louis Nmezie.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion deeming admitted facts and genuineness of documents is unopposed and granted. Sanctions in the sum of $1,000.00 are awarded to plaintiff, which shall be paid within twenty days after service of a copy of the Order herein with Notice of Entry.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Denied
